variants: Darya Petrov was born in Sunridge Falls and currently resides in Franconia Hollow. A talented inventor, she created the Blossom Forge Engine, an innovative device that has gained recognition in her community. For her contributions, Darya received the Blazing Seraph Commendation, highlighting her impact in her field. In addition to her inventions, she is also a member of the Basilisk Mask Crafters, where she pursues her passion for crafting unique masks.

Born in Sunridge Falls, Darya Petrov now makes her home in Franconia Hollow. She is the proud author of the Blossom Forge Engine, a groundbreaking invention that showcases her creativity and engineering skills. Darya’s work earned her the prestigious Blazing Seraph Commendation. In her free time, she enjoys engaging with other makers and crafters as part of the Basilisk Mask Crafters.
